raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch dehſtija Kohka
Dahrſu Bersabâ/ un peefauze tur
o Wahrdü ta KUNGA/ ta
nuſchiga STIPRA DEE-
BA.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Ahbräams mitte/ ka
Sweschineeks eefsch tahs Wihli-
teru Semmes ilgu Laiku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXII. Nodalla.
Ahbraäms/ uß Deewa Pawehleſchanu gribbe,
dams fatwu Dehlu uppureht: 2/ 3. Tohp
zaur weenu Exzei i no Debbeß aiskawehts: 1 1.
Un ta Dſimmuma Wairoſchana/irta Sweh-
ta SEHKLA Utjaunaſchana tohp wiꞥſram
atkai eeſohlita: 15. Naдра Raddi/ kas arri
dſemdinga Betuelu Rebekkas Tehwu: 20/ 21.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N tas notiffahs pehz
ſchahm Leetahm/pabau-
dija Deews Ahbräimu/
un fazzija us to : Ahbräims!
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas atbildeja : Reds/
sche es efmu/ un wiꞥſch fazzija:
Remin jelle tawu Dehlu/ tawu
weenigu/ fo tu mihle/ to Ihsää-
kn/ un eij us to Seimni Morija/
n uppure to tur/par weenu Ded-
amu-Uppuri/ us weenu no teem
Kalneein/ fo es tew fazzischu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Ahbräams zehlahs rib-
ta agri/ un apjohſe fawu Ehseli/
un nehme diwt no fatweem Puif-
ſcheem ar few/ un Ihsääku fawu
Dehlu/ un ſkatdija Malku / par
to Dedſamu-Uppuri/un zehlahs/
un gahje us to Weetu/fo Deews
tam bij fazzijis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Trefchâ Deena/ kad Ahbra-
äns fatwaß Azzis vazchle/tad re-
dſeja wiꞥſch toWeetu no tahſteneg.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Ahbräams fazzija ne-
faweem Puifscheem : Paleezeet
juhs teju ar to Ehseli/ un es/ un
tas Puifis/ eetim us turren/ un
peeluhgſim/ tad ateefim mehs at-
kak pee jums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nehme Ahbräams ta-
Dedsama-Uppura Malku/ un lie-
ke to us Ihsääku fawu Dehlu/ un
nehme fawâ Rohkâ to Ugguni/
un to Nasi / un tee gahje abbee-
kohpâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad runnaja Ihsääks/ a-
Ahbräamu fawu Tehwu/ un faẓ-
ziia : Mans Tehws/ un wiꞥſch
fazzija : Reds/ fche es efmu/
mans Dehls/ un tas fazzija/
Reds/ fche ta Ugguns/ un ta-
Malka/ bet kur irr tas Jehrs par
Dedsamu-Uppuri?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Ahbräims:
Deews jew isredſehs weenn Jeh-
ru/ par Dedsamu-Uppuri/ mane
Dehls/ un tee gahje abbee kohpâ
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un nahze us to Weetu/ ka
Deews winnam bij fazzijis/ un
Ahbräams uſtaifija tur weenu
Altari/ un falikfe to Malku/ un
faistija to Ihsääku fawu Dehlu/
un likke to wirs to Altari / pa-
Malkaſwirfu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Ahbräams isſteepe fa-
wu Rohku/ un nehme to Nasti/
fawu Dehlu nokant.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ta KUNGA Enge-
lis fanze no Debbeß us to/ un faẓ-
ziia: Ahbräims! Ahbräims! uu
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
